creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does this also happen with GCC 7?

Your best bet is for us to report this upstream; I pretty much won't be
able to help, I'm afraid (and Objective C is not very actively maintained).

(If you can run the invocation that crashes adding the -save-temps option
and providing the generated *.i (or similar file, not sure about Objective-C),
I'll do the upstream report, though verifying with GCC 7 will be good.)
